overview: Physician-guided biohacking and regenerative medicine in Colorado Springs, delivering personalized care tailored to individual DNA, biochemistry, and lifestyle. Offers flexible service delivery through at-home, in-clinic, and onsite employer options using clinical-grade medical devices.
highlights: At-home, in-clinic, and onsite employer delivery options
Regenerative medicine therapies (PRP, exosomes, microneedling, shockwave)
targetAudience: Performance-oriented individuals and families seeking personalized hormone and regenerative medicine optimization.
